title: CrossCheck configuration
description: Configuration for CrossCheck, the local-first pre-push AI self-review CLI (CROSSCHECK_PRD.md §12.2).

$schema.description: Editor completion pointer to this schema. Always allowed, never required.

version.description: Config schema version. This release of CrossCheck supports version 1 only.

rules.description: Rule enablement, retuning, and custom rules (§7).

disable.description: Built-in rule ids to turn off.

enable.description: Opt-in built-in rule ids to turn ON (§7.2: payments/amount-math, db/raw-sql-injection, crypto/insecure-random).

dependencySignals.description: Read package.json once per run to tailor findings — downgrade severity / append note / swap remediation (§7.10).

severityOverrides.description: Retune built-in severities per project, keyed by rule id.

custom.description: User-defined rules; glob+regex only in MVP (§7.5).

ignore.description: Extra globs excluded at ingest. Built-ins (lockfiles, dist, binaries) always apply.

provider.description: LLM provider; null disables the LLM pass.

model.description: Any model slug valid for the provider.

apiKeyEnv.description: NAME of the environment variable holding the API key; the key itself is never stored.

maxCostUsdPerReview.description: Aborts the LLM pass (heuristics still render) if the estimate exceeds this.

anonymizePaths.description: Replace file paths with opaque placeholders before transmission (§10.2 stage 5).

consentGiven.description: Per-provider consent map; written by the consent flow, keyed by provider name.

color.description: Auto-disabled when piped regardless; NO_COLOR forces false.

dbPath.description: Resolved against the repo root; "~" allowed.

customRule.description: A user-defined rule (§7.5). Glob+regex matchers only in MVP; compound requireAll/notAddedWith, verifyInFile guard reads, and dependencySignals are allowed. AST matchers are built-in-rule only.

id.description: Stable, kebab-case, namespaced, e.g. "client/no-console-in-prod". Reusing a built-in id overrides that built-in.

category.description: e.g. "custom" or one of the built-in categories.

enabledByDefault.description: Same two-tier semantics as built-ins (§7.2): false = listed as opt-in in `crosscheck rules`.

archetype.description: Design-lens coverage tag (§7.11); metadata, never evaluated.

description.description: Why this matters, one sentence, shown in `rules --verbose`.

when.description: Trigger matchers. AST matchers are built-in-rule only in MVP (§7.5) — custom rules must not declare `ast`.

fileGlobs.description: picomatch globs; ANY match gates the rule (cheap prefilter).

addedLines.description: Regex sources matched against ADDED hunk lines.

removedLines.description: Regex sources matched against REMOVED hunk lines.

requireAll.description: Default false = ANY trigger pattern fires; true = every declared trigger kind must fire (§7.8).

notAddedWith.description: Guard regexes: a match in the ADDED lines vetoes the finding (§7.8).

verifyInFile.description: High-severity rules only: re-check guards against the full current file before firing (§7.9).

references.description: Optional doc links (offline-safe: printed, not fetched).

downgradeTo.description: Fire one level lower when this package is installed.

swapRemediation.description: Replaces the lead checklist item with SDK-specific guidance.
